name: HYPR
description: HYPR — Passwordless authentication platform using FIDO2/WebAuthn for phishing-resistant employee and customer MFA.

seo.title: HYPR — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: HYPR: HYPR — Passwordless authentication platform using FIDO2/WebAuthn for phishing-resistant employee and customer MFA.

when_to_use: FIDO2/WebAuthn passwordless MFA for enterprise workforce
Phishing-resistant authentication for privileged admin access
Mobile push authentication replacing SMS OTP for banking
SCIM-based user provisioning for passwordless SSO rollout
HYPR Adapt risk-based step-up for high-sensitivity actions

pros: True passwordless MFA using FIDO2/WebAuthn standards
Phishing-resistant auth for both workforce and customers
Strong compliance posture for regulated industries
cons: UI feels dated compared to newer passkey SDKs
review.verdict: Enterprise-grade passwordless for banks and regulated shops; overkill for startups that just need passkeys.
review.best_for: Banks, healthcare and regulated enterprises replacing passwords
review.not_for: Small teams wanting a quick passkey drop-in SDK

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
